assertions.description: bus_analysis.spi correctly identifies the SPI interface on U1 with SCK, MISO, MOSI signals in full_duplex mode. NSS chip select not counted (0) because it is on an unnamed single-pin net.
rf_chains is empty. U1 LORA1276 has an ANT pin (pin 14, net __unnamed_5) connected to J1 via PCB trace. The analyzer has no detection for LoRa/SX127x modules as RF chains. This is a coverage gap.
